agent_summary: Customer reports: "I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. Please refund." Classified as wrong_transfer. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-9101.
recommended_next_action: Verify the matched transaction with the customer, attempt recipient contact through official channels, and queue a dispute for human review.
customer_reply: Thank you for letting us know about the transfer (reference TXN-9101). We have logged the concern and our dispute team will review the case. Any eligible amount will be processed through our official in-app support channel or hotline in line with our recovery policy.
